taskTemplate.name: Appraisal Refund
taskTemplate.description: Process appraisal fee refund for adverse loan files

subTaskTemplate.name: Confirm Appraisal Fee Received
subTaskTemplate.description: Confirm Appraisal Fee Received – Verify appraisal fee was received at least 5 business days prior to allow sufficient time for payment processing before issuing refund
subTaskTemplate.type: Appraisal Refund – Confirm Appraisal Fee Received

subTaskTemplate.name: Prepare Refund Check and Letter
subTaskTemplate.description: Prepare Refund Check and Letter – Prepare the appraisal refund check and accompanying refund letter; refund check must be made payable to all borrowers on the loan
subTaskTemplate.type: Appraisal Refund – Prepare Refund Check and Letter

subTaskTemplate.name: Scan Letter and Check to Loan File
subTaskTemplate.description: Scan Letter and Check to Loan File – Scan the signed refund letter and authorized check to the loan file before mailing
subTaskTemplate.type: Appraisal Refund – Scan Letter and Check to Loan File

subTaskTemplate.name: Mail Check
subTaskTemplate.description: Mail Check – Mail the refund check and letter to the borrower(s)
